response: Imagine you’re holding an old, slightly worn green European plug with two round prongs. You’re about to plug it into one of three different wall outlets: one with two round holes, another with two flat slots, or a third with three slots (two flat and one round). Which outlet will it fit into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a dusty green Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
